//: Path tiers for the PR review advisory (.github/scripts/pr-review-advisory.mjs). Adopters override this file to describe THEIR enforcement/security surfaces; the shipped defaults are generic and already cover the automation-template's own CI surfaces (.github/scripts + .github/workflows). Every field is optional — omitted fields fall back to the built-in defaults. Prefixes match on file.startsWith(); securityFiles matches the exact path.
